calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-341 P3 behavioural falsifier 3-arm on SD-056-amended substrate (supersedes V3-EXQ-614a; B_only / ablate_B / ALL_ON)
items.note: Behavioural successor to V3-EXQ-614a (PASS 2026-05-30T19:32Z, interpretation_label PASS_C2_C3_only_mech341_load_bearing_in_stack_only) routed by the SD-056 multi-step rollout stability amend (ree-v3 main d327b89, 2026-05-31T11:25Z) + V3-EXQ-617 substrate-readiness PASS 11:31Z. Re-runs the 3-arm MECH-341 P3 falsifier (ARM_0 B_only / ARM_1 ablate_B / ARM_2 ALL_ON) on the SD-056-amended substrate. Five SD-056 amend lever flags applied UNIFORMLY across all 3 arms (held constant on the diversity-axis comparison so R2.c interpretation is not confounded): e2_action_contrastive_multistep_enabled=True (Lever (a); h=5), e2_rollout_output_norm_clamp_enabled=True (Lever (b); ratio=2.0), e2_action_contrastive_enabled=True + weight=0.01 (t=1 contrastive ON; substrate default OFF). User-confirmed scope 2026-05-31T12:31Z via AskUserQuestion. Acceptance criteria UNCHANGED vs 614a: C1 R2.c MECH-341 isolation entropy_nats > 0.3 + n_classes >= 2 on >= 2/3 seeds; C2 ablate_B necessity entropy delta >= 0.1; C3 Rung-1 ALL_ON works on >= 2/3 seeds; PASS = C1 fires OR (C2 AND C3) fires; FAIL = neither. 4-row interpretation grid copied verbatim from 614a + header note clarifying that under the amended substrate PASS via C1 is now the load-bearing target (614a established PASS via C2+C3); if 614b lands PASS via C2+C3 only again, route as substrate-stable-but-isolation-still-not-clearing under the same R2.c-isolation-deferred reading (Q-054 entropy_bias_scale sweep + stratified_temperature revisit, NOT fresh /diagnose-errors loop). env_kwargs IDENTICAL to V3-EXQ-611/611c/614a (SD-054 reef-bipartite + hazard_food_attraction + harm_history) for direct manifest comparability. claim_ids=[MECH-341, ARC-065] per claim_ids accuracy rule (science identical to 614a; only substrate amended underneath). Smoke 2026-05-31T12:40Z dry-run (3 arms x 1 seed x P0=2 + P1=2 ep x 30 steps): all 3 arms boot + verdict PASS + manifest+sentinel emit_outcome fired; dry-run outcome FAIL expected at minimum budget. validate_experiments AST PASS; ASCII-clean. Cross-plan: same Layer-B substrate stabilisation unblocks arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B (V3-EXQ-543l successor cohort) under shared SD-056-amended substrate. Sibling concurrent claim queue-experiment-v3-exq-569a-arc-065-gap-a-r1b-20260531T123128Z (ARC-065 GAP-A) holds disjoint script path; coordinated via re-read-before-write per user-approved protocol.

items.title: SD-049 Phase 3 SD-032 consumer cascade substrate-readiness (3-arm + direct-API probes)
items.note: SD-049 Phase 3 SD-032 consumer cascade substrate-readiness diagnostic. Substrate landed 2026-05-31T13:00Z via implement-substrate-sd049-phase-3-consumer-cascade session: REEConfig.use_sd049_per_axis_consumer_cascade master flag (default OFF, bit-identical) + 7 per-consumer combiner defaults (AIC/dACC/Salience/Override/MECH-295=max, PCC=mean, pACC=sum) + per_axis_drive/per_axis_combiner kwargs threaded through 7 consumer call sites + REEAgent._current_goal_axis_idx attribute + _per_axis_drive_for_consumers() gate helper + obs_per_axis_drive kwarg on sense(). 28/28 Phase 3 contract tests PASS (tests/contracts/test_sd049_phase3_consumer_cascade.py). The contract tests prove API surface correctness and bit-identical-OFF; they do NOT prove the substrate produces discriminable outputs under the operating-condition shapes a behavioural validation would probe. V3-EXQ-618 is the substrate-readiness diagnostic that must PASS before queuing the V3-EXQ-514g-successor behavioural validation (mirrors EXQ-611 -> EXQ-614 pattern). Two phases: Phase A end-to-end smoke (3 arms x 3 seeds: ARM_0 BASELINE_CASCADE_OFF / ARM_1 CASCADE_ON_COMBINER_ONLY / ARM_2 CASCADE_ON_AXIS_AWARE with per-episode _current_goal_axis_idx cycling across {0,1,2}; 5 warmup + 10 measurement eps x 200 steps per cell) catches plumbing crashes + env-level per-axis drive evolution sanity. Phase B direct-API probes (no agent forward pass; built once with cascade ON + AIC + MECH-295 enabled): feeds 4 controlled per_axis_drive vectors with high inter-axis variance through AIC.tick (per-axis vs None) and MECH295LikingBridge.compute_approach_cue_score_bias (axis-aware vs combiner-only at non-max axis) on K=8 synthetic candidate_proximities (linspace 0..1). Acceptance: C1 per-axis drive evolves (np.max(peak)>0.02 all 9 cells; replicates EXQ-513 C2c) AND C2 Phase A no-crash (9/9 cells complete) AND C3 AIC reads per-axis (mean L1 aic_salience per-axis vs None >= 0.005 across 4 inputs; tests AIC actually consumes the per-axis kwarg) AND C4 MECH-295 axis-routing differs from combiner-only (mean L1 score_bias axis-routed-non-max vs combiner-only >= 0.005 across 4 inputs x 8 candidates; tests axis-routing actually routes by axis). PASS routes to V3-EXQ-619 load-bearing behavioural validation (V3-EXQ-514g-successor structure with trained agent + active goal_state on Phase 3 substrate; unblocks goal_pipeline:GAP-2 cluster SD-049/SD-015/MECH-229/MECH-230/MECH-117/ARC-030/ARC-032/Q-030). FAIL routes per the 5-row interpretation grid in the script docstring (C3-only/C4-only failures route to /diagnose-errors on AIC integration or MECH-295 axis-routing respectively; C3+C4 both FAIL = plumbing-level failure on shared per_axis_drive helper). Intentionally does NOT depend on z_goal (collapsed per goal_pipeline:GAP-4 / V3-EXQ-490g cohort) -- MECH-295 axis-routing exercised by setting _current_goal_axis_idx directly from harness + probing bridge via public API on captured (per_axis_drive, goal_axis_idx) tuples. claim_ids=[SD-049, MECH-295] per CLAUDE.md Accuracy Rule (SD-049 Phase 3 master substrate + MECH-295 axis-routing both directly tested; SD-015/MECH-229/MECH-230 encoder-level and SD-032b/c/d/e other consumers not directly under test). experiment_purpose=diagnostic (substrate-readiness; scoring-excluded from governance per Phase-3 rules). evidence_direction_per_claim: SD-049 supports if C1+C2+C3 PASS (cascade plumbing alive); MECH-295 supports if C4 PASS (axis-routing produces effect), mixed if C3 PASS but C4 FAIL, weakens otherwise. Smoke dry-run 2026-05-31T16:34Z (1 seed x 3 arms x 15 eps + Phase B): 4/4 acceptance criteria PASS; C1 peak_drive [0.041, 0.061, 0.02]; C2 no crashes; C3 aic_mean_l1=5.92 (>> 0.005 floor); C4 mech295_mean_l1=0.169 (>> 0.005 floor); 23s elapsed; outcome PASS. validate_experiments.py AST PASS; ASCII-clean. machine_affinity=any (cloud-eligible; ~75s Phase A * 3 seeds + Phase B ~5s estimated at full scale, well under 20-min budget). Cross-link: V3-EXQ-619 behavioural validation owed on PASS (separately queued post-618 review). Working-tree-vs-HEAD audit clean before append; pathspec-limited commit avoids sweeping concurrent IGW-027 INV-074 session (stalled on Claude spending cap at 17:20pm reset; queue_id collision-free as 027 will pick a different EXQ id when it resumes).

items.title: MECH-090 R-c commit-entry readiness conjunction validation (4-arm; supersedes V3-EXQ-592c)
items.note: MECH-090 R-c commit-entry readiness conjunction validation, expanded 4-arm successor to V3-EXQ-592b/c (both 2-arm; both FAIL on a script that exercised only the within-tick score_margin axis -- 592b DLAPTOP 2026-05-29, 592c ree-cloud-3 2026-05-30). 592d adds the across-tick motor-program readiness axis (landed 2026-05-29 as ree_core/policy/commit_readiness.py + REEConfig use_mech090_readiness_conjunction master + AND-composition at both elevate sites in agent.py select_action). FIRST-EVER validation of the nav_competence axis. Arm matrix (4 arms x 3 seeds = 12 cells): ARM_0 BASELINE_BOTH_OFF (use_commit_readiness_gate=False, use_mech090_readiness_conjunction=False) -- pure legacy rv-only commit entry, reference baseline for commit-rate / false-commit-rate / time-to-commit. ARM_1 SCORE_MARGIN_ONLY (use_commit_readiness_gate=True floor=0.05) -- within-tick decisiveness axis alone, replicates 592b/c substrate at full 4-arm context. ARM_2 NAV_COMPETENCE_ONLY (use_mech090_readiness_conjunction=True floor=0.3 initial=0.0) -- across-tick motor-program readiness axis alone, initial=0.0 fail-closed start so the gate has the opportunity to block (default 1.0 fail-open would make the gate permanently admit absent harness push). ARM_3 BOTH_GATES_ON (both axes active, intended-production config). Curriculum: matched to V3-EXQ-592c (P0 warmup on EASY env size=10 / 2 hazards / 2 resources / tolerance_frac=0.30, budget=400 ep x 200 step; P2 frozen-policy eval on TARGET env size=10 / 4 hazards / 3 resources / tolerance_frac=0.15, 50 ep x 200 step). ARM_2 / ARM_3 push nav_competence_proxy = clip([0,1], 1.0 - rv/commit_threshold) via agent.commit_readiness.notify_outcome AFTER every P2 env.step (custom P2 inner loop in script -- substrate Phase 1 does not auto-wire notify_outcome from env). Metrics: per-arm-per-seed total_committed_steps / n_commit_entries / n_commit_blocks_score_margin / n_commit_blocks_nav_competence / mean_time_to_commit / false_commit_rate (commit fired while rv<threshold AND proxy<0.3 -- V3-EXQ-592-seed-42 degenerate signature) / final_readiness / final_rv / mean_p2_hold_rate. Per-arm aggregate: commit_rate_across_seeds, false_commit_rate_across_seeds, time_to_commit_p50_p90. Acceptance: C1 ARM_0 commit_rate > 0.001 (baseline fires) / C2 ARM_1 false_rate < ARM_0 false_rate * 0.7 (score_margin discriminates) / C3 ARM_2 blocks_nav >= 1 AND ARM_2 commit_rate < ARM_0 commit_rate (nav_competence fires) / C4 ARM_3 false_rate < 0.10 AND ARM_3 commit_rate > 0 (conjunction suppresses degenerate without lock-out). PASS = C1 AND (C2 OR C3) AND C4. 4-row interpretation grid in script docstring: PASS -> R-c validated, commitment_closure:GAP-4 substrate_landed_pending_validation -> done substrate-side, queue *b cohort (V3-EXQ-460b/461/463b/464b/466b/467b/468b); C1 FAIL -> /diagnose-errors on curriculum (test setup broken); C2 PASS+C3 FAIL -> nav_competence-only diagnostic with floor sweep {0.5, 0.7, 0.9}; C2 FAIL+C3 PASS -> score_margin-only diagnostic with floor sweep {0.01, 0.02, 0.05, 0.10}; All FAIL -> R-c retest via /diagnose-errors on agent.py flag propagation. claim_ids=[MECH-090] only (single-claim per CLAUDE.md claim_ids Accuracy Rule -- SD-034/MECH-266/267/268 are transitively unblocked by GAP-4 substrate completion but not directly tested by this substrate-readiness diagnostic; cross-claim governance evidence comes from the *b cohort behavioural arms queued post-PASS). experiment_purpose=diagnostic (substrate-readiness; NOT standalone governance evidence). Smoke 2026-05-31T13:08Z dry-run (4 arms x 1 seed x 5 ep P0 + 2 ep P2 x 20 steps): 4/4 arm verdicts PASS, all arms boot + emit progress prints (ep N/M denominator=p0_budget loop var, Seed/Condition boundary lines, verdict per cell), ARM_2/ARM_3 blocks_nav=6 confirming nav_competence gate fires under failclosed initial=0.0 + per-tick proxy push; counter-accumulation fix verified (BetaGate / CommitReadiness reset() clears counters per-episode; script accumulates per-episode deltas instead of pre/post-P2 snapshot). validate_experiments.py AST PASS; ASCII-clean. machine_affinity=DLAPTOP-4.local (Mac CPU fastest for online stepping; 592b/c precedent). Budget: 4 arms x 3 seeds x (P0=400 + P2=50 ep) x ~0.1 min/ep on Mac = ~270 min worst-case + curriculum-harness overhead -> 450 min. Pathspec-limited queue append (concurrent SD-049 Phase 3 session edits agent.py + config.py on disjoint code paths; concurrent ARC-065 GAP-A + MECH-341 GAP-B queue entries kept; working-tree-vs-HEAD audit confirmed no foreign queue entries before append). Cross-link IGW-20260531-021. Predecessor synthesis: REE_assembly/evidence/literature/targeted_review_connectome_mech_090/synthesis.md commit 9e68c5ca8a.

items.title: SD-037 axis (a) Phase 1 substrate-readiness diagnostic: log raw BLA/CeA/PAG/dACC consumer-input distributions over fishtank baseline
items.note: Phase 1 substrate-readiness diagnostic for SD-037 axis (a) consumer-input-threshold recalibration plan landed 2026-05-31T16:54Z at REE_assembly/evidence/planning/sd_037_axis_a_consumer_input_recalibration_plan.md. Logs raw per-step distributions of the six quantities that feed every SD-037-cascade consumer-module input gate: z_harm_a_norm (BLA arousal_threshold_on input), cea_low_freq_magnitude (CeA fast_route_threshold input; read from cea._last_low_freq_mag, the same scalar CeA compares against fast_route_threshold at cea.py:337), z_harm_a_instant_val (PAG duration_input_threshold input), pag_sustained_product (PAG theta_freeze input; z_harm_a * pag._duration_above_threshold), bla_pe_magnitude (BLA PE channel), dacc_pe (dACC PE input; read from dacc._last_bundle['pe']). Per-quantity output per seed and pooled: min/max/mean/std + p10/25/50/70/80/90/95/99 + 20-bin histogram + zero-fraction. Substrate matches V3-EXQ-483e ARM_0 OFF_OFF configuration (PAG-engaging via SD-036+MECH-279, SalienceCoordinator + dACC + lateral_pfc + amygdala all enabled, dacc_bias_max_abs=0.1 + dacc_weight=0.1 so dACC PE distribution is observable -- closes the V3-EXQ-483c-era oversight) but with use_broadcast_override=False and all four MECH-281 cascade gains 0.0. Pure baseline -- measures the natural fishtank distribution every consumer-module input gate sees when the broadcast is silent. 3 seeds (42,7,19) x 50 warmup + 10 eval ep x 200 steps/ep matching the 483e budget for direct distribution comparability. claim_ids=[] -- this is measurement, not hypothesis test. experiment_purpose=diagnostic (scoring-excluded from governance per Phase-3 rules). Emits flat JSON manifest to evidence/experiments/ AND a plan-side markdown summary at evidence/planning/sd037_consumer_input_distributions_<TS>.md (the canonical input to Phase 2 p70 recalibration rule). PASS = manifest emitted with all six quantity distributions populated (n>0 per quantity in the pooled summary). PASS routes to Phase 2 (deterministic p70 recalibration applied as per-experiment overrides on BLAConfig.arousal_threshold_on / CeAConfig.fast_route_threshold / PAGFreezeGateConfig.duration_input_threshold + theta_freeze / DACCConfig.dacc_precision_scale; sensitivity sweep p60/p80 reserved within axis (a) before falling back to axis (b)) -> Phase 3 verification diagnostic -> Phase 4 V3-EXQ-483f behavioural validation only after Phase 3 PASSes its consumer-peaks-above-zero acceptance gate. FAIL with all six pooled distributions all-zero would indicate the upstream affective stream itself is silent at fishtank baseline -- skip p60/p80 sweep, route directly to axis (b) SD-029-style sustained-threat env curriculum. Smoke 2026-05-31T17:48Z dry-run (1 seed x 2+2 ep x 30 steps) all six quantities sampled (n=42 each) with manifest+plan-summary+emit_outcome PASS sentinel emitted; dry-run distributions ARE all-zero at min-budget which is expected (30-step episodes too short to encounter hazards; full 200-step budget will reveal whether baseline z_harm_a actually moves). validate_experiments.py AST PASS post-fix; ASCII-clean. Concurrent active sibling igw-auto-igw-030-retest-after-substrate-inv-074-20260531T172643Z holds an active claim on this same file -- coordinated via re-read-before-write + Step 5 working-tree-vs-HEAD audit (clean before append: V3-EXQ-620 not in HEAD or working tree before this commit) + pathspec-limited commit on queue + script only. V3-EXQ-619 verbally reserved for SD-049 Phase 3 behavioural successor (per V3-EXQ-618 queue note); V3-EXQ-620 chosen to leave both 619 and any IGW-030 grab free.
